item.title: This is 100% true. I used to work for CALTRANS (California Dept. of Transportation) and we had crews that would do this. And when they say everything, we would throw away EVERYTHING. What little they had, we took away. It was heartbreaking.

item.title: Your IP address is used to identify you, track you, and map your online life.
item.description:
https://www.nbcnews.com/tech/internet/vpns-encryption-wifi-rcna9348
https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/articles/cn438z3ejxyo
Yeah, nothing to do with mass surveillance...
I recommend Mullvad VPN ( https://mullvad.net/en/vpn )
Even on mobile, it blocks (almost) all ads.
I can also recommend these three: https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/ublock-origin https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/noscript https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/ghostery
item.dc:creator: AToMexe

item.title: I ate a whole box of cookies
item.description: as the title said I quit drinking over a year ago. So far so good. But, I think I replaced some of the sugar from the beer and booze with other stuff which usually means cookies. I ate a whole damn box of chewy chocolate chip cookies last night. I woke up this morning and thought I could have powered my car from all the farting. Jesus christ. Just ripping them left and right.
item.dc:creator: oldradios19772000

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #209
item.description: First, they came for the rules. Now, they are coming for the people who enforce them. ? The goal is to leave no one inside the government who still believes in facts. A CDC director is fired and vaccine access is restricted not because of new science, but because the people in charge reject it. A senior CIA expert who briefs the president is purged days later, and an independent regulator is fired just before he can rule on a massive corporate merger. They're even rewriting the rules to ensure new judges only need the right political outlook, not experience. When expertise becomes a fireable offense, the entire system is designed to fail us. ?️ Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-redistricting-slam-unconstitutional 2. https://go.govbrief.today/ice-arrests-wildfire-crew 3. https://go.govbrief.today/air-force-honors-babbitt 4. https://go.govbrief.today/national-guard-lanscaping-trash 5. https://go.govbrief.today/chicago-takeover-naval-station 6. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-threaten-soros-rico 7. https://go.govbrief.today/target-dei-boycott-extended 8. https://go.govbrief.today/fulton-commission-contempt-fines 9. https://go.govbrief.today/us-naval-buildup-venezuela 10. https://go.govbrief.today/us-denmark-greenland-influence 11. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-congo-conflict-claim 12. https://go.govbrief.today/kushner-blair-gaza-meeting 13. https://go.govbrief.today/dhs-bars-groups-aid 14. https://go.govbrief.today/florida-detention-center-emptying-out 15. https://go.govbrief.today/cdc-director-ousted-resignations 16. https://go.govbrief.today/cdc-director-fired-resignations 17. https://go.govbrief.today/cdc-foodborne-surveillance-cut 18. https://go.govbrief.today/rfk-pressures-wv-vaccines 19. https://go.govbrief.today/cia-russia-trump-gabbard 20. https://go.govbrief.today/gabbard-undercover-cia-officer 21. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-mexico-water-tariffs 22. https://go.govbrief.today/capitol-riot-court-refund 23. https://go.govbrief.today/abrego-garcia-asylum-filing 24. https://go.govbrief.today/doj-immigration-judge-requirements 25. https://go.govbrief.today/student-visa-time-restrictions 26. https://go.govbrief.today/louisiana-scotus-voting-rights 27. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-fires-stb-member 28. https://go.govbrief.today/gop-probes-wikipedia-bias Yesterday's Most Read - https://go.govbrief.today/grand-jury-no-felony Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/grand-jury-sandwich-thrower Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Imugr, I didn't forget you. Been a helluva week! Protip: if I'm super-late, have a look at the website. If you see new stuff, I'm on the way. If you don't see new stuff, I dunno, maybe start a GoFundMe or visit me in my workcamp.
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
